basic_details.job_title: MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 23 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Maharashtra State Co-operative Bank Ltd. (MSC Bank), Mumbai has released the MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026 notification (Advertisement No. 06/MSC Bank/2026-2027, dated 20 June 2026) for 23 Cooperative Intern vacancies across the Maharashtra State Cooperative Bank Ltd. and 22 District Central Cooperative Banks in Maharashtra. MBA or 2-year PGDM graduates aged 21 to 30 years as on 01 June 2026 can apply offline from 20 June 2026 to 10 July 2026 till 5:15 PM. Selected interns will receive a consolidated monthly stipend of ₹25,000.

age_limit.details: Criteria Age Minimum Age 21 years Maximum Age 30 years Date of Birth - Not before 01 June 1996 Date of Birth - Not after 01 June 2005

qualification.details: To be eligible for the MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026, candidates must have completed a full 2-year MBA or PGDM in specific management disciplines from an AICTE/UGC-accredited institution. Candidates who are currently pursuing their MBA or PGDM course and have not yet completed it are not eligible to apply. Additionally, computer proficiency is listed as an essential qualification alongside the management degree. | MBA or 2-year Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) in any of the following specialisations, from an institution accredited by AICTE or UGC: | Marketing Management Cooperative Management Agri Business Management Rural Development Management | Only candidates who have successfully completed the 2-year MBA/PGDM course are eligible. Those currently pursuing the course cannot apply. | Proficiency in computers is mandatory for all applicants. Candidates should preferably hold MS-CIT or an equivalent computer certification.

salary_details.holidays: As applicable to the respective posting bank
salary_details.details: The monthly remuneration for selected Cooperative Interns is a consolidated ₹25,000 per month, paid by the respective State Cooperative Bank or District Central Cooperative Bank where the intern is posted. This is not a regular salary but a fixed internship stipend for the one-year duration. T.A.D.A. (Travelling and Daily Allowance) will also be provided by the respective posting bank.

selection_process: The selection process for the MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026 is straightforward - applications are accepted offline

and only shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview. Final selection is at the discretionary power of the Bank/Selection Committee. There is no written examination mentioned in the notification.
Step 1 - Application Screening: The bank shortlists candidates from the offline applications received based on eligibility criteria.
Step 2 - Interview: Only shortlisted candidates are called for a personal interview. The exact date and venue of the interview are communicated to shortlisted candidates directly.
Step 3 - Final Selection: The Selection Committee's decision on final selection is discretionary and binding.
how_to_apply: The MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Apply 2026 process is entirely offline - there is no online application portal for this recruitment. Candidates must download the prescribed application form (Annexure-I) from the bank's website, fill it in their own handwriting, attach all supporting documents, and physically submit it to the bank's Mumbai head office before the deadline. Applications submitted after 5:15 PM on 10 July 2026 will not be accepted.
Visit the official MSC Bank website at https://msc.bank.in/career and download the Application Form (Annexure-I)

Fill the application form in your own handwriting with all required details including name, address, date of birth, educational qualifications, MBA/PGDM specialisation, computer proficiency, work experience, and references
Affix a recent passport-size photograph in the designated space and sign in the signature box
Attach self-attested photocopies of all relevant qualification certificates, computer proficiency certificate, and experience certificates (if any)
Provide details of two references - bankers, professionals, or government officials who are residents of India, holders of responsible positions, and not related to you
Place the completed application and all documents in a sealed envelope
Write "Application for the post of Cooperative Intern" on the envelope

Submit or send the sealed envelope to: The Joint Manager (OSD), HRD&M Department, The Maharashtra State Cooperative Bank Ltd., Sir Vithaldas Thackersey Memorial Building, 9, Maharashtra Chamber of Commerce Lane, Fort, Mumbai – 400001
Ensure delivery on or before 10 July 2026 till 5:15 PM

content_sections.heading: MSC Bank Cooperative Intern 2026 Notification PDF Download
content_sections.text: Download the MSC Bank Cooperative Intern 2026 notification and application form from The notification was issued under the directions of the National Cooperative Development Corporation (NCDC), Ministry of Cooperation, Government of India, and NABARD's instructions to State Cooperative Banks and District Cooperative Banks to engage Cooperative Interns for one year.

content_sections.heading: Quick Summary - MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026

rows.information: Maharashtra State Co-operative Bank Ltd. (MSC Bank)

content_sections.heading: Important Dates for MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates interested in the MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Programme 2026 must act quickly, as the application window is only about 20 days. Applications are accepted from 20 June 2026 and the last date to submit the filled application form is 10 July 2026 till 5:15 PM . Applications received after the due date will not be entertained under any circumstances.

content_sections.heading: MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Vacancy 2026 - Bank-wise Breakdown
content_sections.text: The MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Vacancy 2026 covers 23 positions , with 1 intern posted at the Maharashtra State Cooperative Bank Ltd., Mumbai and 1 intern each at all 22 District Central Cooperative Banks spread across Maharashtra. Each bank receives exactly one Cooperative Intern for the one-year internship programme.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for MSC Bank Cooperative Intern 2026
content_sections.text: To be eligible for the MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026, candidates must have completed a full 2-year MBA or PGDM in specific management disciplines from an AICTE/UGC-accredited institution. Candidates who are currently pursuing their MBA or PGDM course and have not yet completed it are not eligible to apply. Additionally, computer proficiency is listed as an essential qualification alongside the management degree. MBA or 2-year Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) in any of the following specialisations, from an institution accredited by AICTE or UGC: Marketing Management Cooperative Management Agri Business Management Rural Development Management Only candidates who have successfully completed the 2-year MBA/PGDM course are eligible. Those currently pursuing the course cannot apply. Proficiency in computers is mandatory for all applicants. Candidates should preferably hold MS-CIT or an equivalent computer certification.

content_sections.heading: Stipend and Leave - MSC Bank Cooperative Intern 2026
content_sections.text: The monthly remuneration for selected Cooperative Interns is a consolidated ₹25,000 per month , paid by the respective State Cooperative Bank or District Central Cooperative Bank where the intern is posted. This is not a regular salary but a fixed internship stipend for the one-year duration. T.A.D.A. (Travelling and Daily Allowance) will also be provided by the respective posting bank.

rows.details: As applicable to the respective posting bank

content_sections.heading: Roles and Responsibilities of Cooperative Intern
content_sections.text: Candidates applying for the MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Programme 2026 will be assigned substantive responsibilities at the grassroots level. The intern is not merely an observer - they are expected to coordinate with Primary Agricultural Credit Societies (PACS) and other primary cooperatives, and prepare weekly progress reports for the Ministry of Cooperation. This is a full-time programme, and interns must observe the working hours of the concerned bank. Key duties include: Coordinating with Primary Agricultural Credit Society (PACS) and other primary cooperatives to provide guidance for implementing Ministry of Cooperation initiatives Solving day-to-day problems faced by PACS in computerisation, preparation of business plans, projects, financing issues, and various approvals Preparing and sharing weekly status reports on the implementation of Ministry of Cooperation initiatives, in coordination with the State Cooperative Bank and District Central Cooperative Banks

content_sections.heading: Selection Process - MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The selection process for the MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026 is straightforward - applications are accepted offline, and only shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview. Final selection is at the discretionary power of the Bank/Selection Committee. There is no written examination mentioned in the notification. Step 1 - Application Screening: The bank shortlists candidates from the offline applications received based on eligibility criteria. Step 2 - Interview: Only shortlisted candidates are called for a personal interview. The exact date and venue of the interview are communicated to shortlisted candidates directly. Step 3 - Final Selection: The Selection Committee's decision on final selection is discretionary and binding.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply Offline - MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Apply 2026
content_sections.text: The MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Apply 2026 process is entirely offline - there is no online application portal for this recruitment. Candidates must download the prescribed application form (Annexure-I) from the bank's website, fill it in their own handwriting, attach all supporting documents, and physically submit it to the bank's Mumbai head office before the deadline. Applications submitted after 5:15 PM on 10 July 2026 will not be accepted. Step-by-step application process: Visit the official MSC Bank website at https://msc.bank.in/career and download the Application Form (Annexure-I) Fill the application form in your own handwriting with all required details including name, address, date of birth, educational qualifications, MBA/PGDM specialisation, computer proficiency, work experience, and references Affix a recent passport-size photograph in the designated space and sign in the signature box Attach self-attested photocopies of all relevant qualification certificates, computer proficiency certificate, and experience certificates (if any) Provide details of two references - bankers, professionals, or government officials who are residents of India, holders of responsible positions, and not related to you Place the completed application and all documents in a sealed envelope Write "Application for the post of Cooperative Intern" on the envelope Submit or send the sealed envelope to: The Joint Manager (OSD), HRD&M Department, The Maharashtra State Cooperative Bank Ltd., Sir Vithaldas Thackersey Memorial Building, 9, Maharashtra Chamber of Commerce Lane, Fort, Mumbai – 400001 Ensure delivery on or before 10 July 2026 till 5:15 PM

content_sections.heading: Documents Required - MSC Bank Cooperative Intern 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must enclose self-attested photocopies of all supporting documents along with the application form (Annexure-I). Submitting incorrect or false information makes the candidate liable for disqualification and, if appointed, for dismissal from service without notice. Required documents to enclose with the application: Passport-size photograph (affixed on the form) Proof of date of birth Marksheets and certificates from Matriculation through MBA/PGDM (including Bachelor's degree) MBA/PGDM degree or provisional certificate confirming successful completion Computer proficiency certificate (MS-CIT or equivalent) Any additional professional qualification certificates (JAIIB/CAIIB, certifications, etc.) Work experience certificates, if applicable Details of two references (bankers/professionals/government officials, non-relatives) PAN Card copy Aadhaar Card copy

content_sections.heading: Important Terms and Conditions for MSC Bank Cooperative Interns
content_sections.text: Candidates must clearly understand that the MSC Bank Cooperative Internship 2026 is not a job offer and does not create any right or claim for regular employment with MSC Bank or any associated institution. The internship can be discontinued at any time without payment of financial benefit if the intern's performance is unsatisfactory or if the intern is absent without authorisation. Interns are also bound by strict confidentiality obligations regarding bank documents, policies, and business plans. Key terms to note: This is a full-time internship programme - interns must observe bank working hours The internship may be terminated at any time without assigning reasons Interns must not interact with media (print/electronic/social media) or represent the bank without express permission Interns must maintain confidentiality of all documents, reports, and information received during the internship - violation entails legal consequences No intern can post work-related content on social media without written permission from competent authority The internship confers no right to employment with the bank or associated institutions

content_sections.heading: Troubleshooting and Common Mistakes to Avoid
content_sections.text: Since the MSC Bank Cooperative Intern application process is entirely offline, several common errors can lead to rejection. Being aware of these before submitting your application saves time and avoids disappointment. Applying while still pursuing MBA/PGDM: The notification is clear - candidates currently pursuing the 2-year MBA/PGDM are not eligible. Only those who have already completed the degree should apply. Missing the 5:15 PM deadline on 10 July 2026: This is not a midnight deadline - it is 5:15 PM sharp. Applications received even minutes after 5:15 PM on 10 July will not be accepted. Plan for early submission or courier delivery with tracking. Not filling the form in own handwriting: The application form (Annexure-I) must be handwritten by the candidate. Typed or printed personal details in the form may be grounds for rejection. Not mentioning MBA/PGDM specialisation clearly: The form has a checkbox for specialisation (Marketing Management, Cooperative Management, Agri Business Management, Rural Development Management). Leaving this blank creates ambiguity. Omitting computer proficiency certificate: Computer proficiency is listed as an essential qualification. Candidates who do not enclose proof of MS-CIT or equivalent certification risk rejection. Providing relatives as references: The notification explicitly states that references must not be relations. Providing a family member as a reference is a disqualifying error. Wrong envelope superscription: The envelope must be labelled "Application for the post of Cooperative Intern." Using any other labelling or no labelling may result in the envelope being misrouted. Submitting only the form without supporting documents: Self-attested photocopies of all qualification certificates must accompany the form. An incomplete application without supporting documents will not be processed.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026 is 10 July 2026 till 5:15 PM. Applications received after this time will not be considered.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available under MSC Bank Cooperative Intern 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 23 Cooperative Intern vacancies are available — 1 at the Maharashtra State Cooperative Bank Ltd., Mumbai, and 1 each at 22 District Central Cooperative Banks across Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification for MSC Bank Cooperative Intern 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a completed MBA or 2-year PGDM in Marketing Management, Cooperative Management, Agri Business Management, or Rural Development Management from an AICTE/UGC-accredited institution. Candidates currently pursuing MBA/PGDM are not eligible.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit is a minimum of 21 years and maximum of 30 years as on 01 June 2026. This means candidates must have been born not before 01 June 1996 and not after 01 June 2005.

faq.question: Q5. What is the monthly stipend for MSC Bank Cooperative Interns?
faq.answer: Selected Cooperative Interns will receive a consolidated monthly stipend of ₹25,000, paid by the respective State Cooperative Bank or District Central Cooperative Bank where they are posted. T.A.D.A. is also provided by the respective bank.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for MSC Bank Cooperative Intern 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for MSC Bank Cooperative Intern 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two stages: shortlisting of candidates from offline applications received, followed by a personal interview. Only shortlisted candidates are called for the interview, and final selection is at the discretionary power of the Bank/Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q8. How do I apply for MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode is offline only. Download the application form (Annexure-I) from https://msc.bank.in/career, fill it in your own handwriting, attach self-attested document copies, and submit the sealed envelope to the Joint Manager (OSD), HRD&M Department, MSC Bank Ltd., Fort, Mumbai – 400001, by 10 July 2026 till 5:15 PM.

faq.question: Q9. Does this internship guarantee a job at MSC Bank?
faq.answer: No. The notification clearly states that the internship is neither an employment nor an assurance of employment with the bank or any associated institution. No intern can claim any right of appointment by virtue of completing this internship.

faq.question: Q10. What is the duration and leave entitlement for MSC Bank Cooperative Interns?
faq.answer: The internship is for one year. Interns are entitled to 10 days of Casual Leave (CL) for the year. Any other leaves are granted as leave without remuneration. Public holidays are available as applicable to the respective posting bank.
